languages.original_text: "It could not have been otherwise, pure-hearted sister. Now the iron xenos will drink from the cup of the Allfather's wrath. Glorious sagas will be written about the captain who was freed by the Aett-Vater!"

languages.text: "Иначе и быть не могло, чистосердная сестра. Теперь железные ксеносы сполна отхлебнут из чаши гнева Всеотца. Славные саги сложат про капитана, что был освобожден эттфатером!"

"It could not have been otherwise, pure-hearted sister. Now the iron xenos will drink from the cup of the Allfather's wrath. Glorious sagas will be written about the captain who was freed by the Aett-Vater!"

"It could not have been otherwise, pure-hearted sister. Now the iron xenos will drink from the cup of the Allfather's wrath. Glorious sagas will be written about the captain who was freed by the Aett-Vater!"

"It could not have been otherwise, pure-hearted sister. Now the iron xenos will drink from the cup of the Allfather's wrath. Glorious sagas will be written about the captain who was freed by the Aett-Vater!"

languages.text: 「そうなるしかありませんでした、純粋な心を持つ妹よ。鉄の異種族は、全父の神の怒りの杯を飲むことになるだろう。アット・ヴァターによって解放された船長についての栄光ある物語が書かれるだろう！」
languages.original_text: "It could not have been otherwise, pure-hearted sister. Now the iron xenos will drink from the cup of the Allfather's wrath. Glorious sagas will be written about the captain who was freed by the Aett-Vater!"

traits.locale_text: 「そうなるしかありませんでした、純粋な心を持つ妹よ。鉄の異種族は、全父の神の怒りの杯を飲むことになるだろう。アット・ヴァターによって解放された船長についての栄光ある物語が書かれるだろう！」

languages.text: « Il n'aurait pas pu en être autrement, ma sœur au cœur pur. À présent, les xénos de fer boiront au calice de la colère du Père de Tous. On écrira de glorieuses sagas racontant la libération du capitaine par l'aett-vater ! »
languages.original_text: "It could not have been otherwise, pure-hearted sister. Now the iron xenos will drink from the cup of the Allfather's wrath. Glorious sagas will be written about the captain who was freed by the Aett-Vater!"

traits.locale_text: « Il n'aurait pas pu en être autrement, ma sœur au cœur pur. À présent, les xénos de fer boiront au calice de la colère du Père de Tous. On écrira de glorieuses sagas racontant la libération du capitaine par l'aett-vater ! »

languages.text: "Anders kann es nicht gewesen sein, reinherzige Schwester. Jetzt werden die Eisenxenos vom Kelch des Zorns des Allvaters kosten. Ruhmreiche Sagas werden über den Captain geschrieben werden, der vom Aett-Vater befreit wurde."
languages.original_text: "It could not have been otherwise, pure-hearted sister. Now the iron xenos will drink from the cup of the Allfather's wrath. Glorious sagas will be written about the captain who was freed by the Aett-Vater!"

traits.locale_text: "Anders kann es nicht gewesen sein, reinherzige Schwester. Jetzt werden die Eisenxenos vom Kelch des Zorns des Allvaters kosten. Ruhmreiche Sagas werden über den Captain geschrieben werden, der vom Aett-Vater befreit wurde."

languages.text: "Başka türlü olamazdı temiz kalpli rahibe. Şimdi demir zenolar, Yücebaba'nın gazap kâsesinden içecek. Aett-Vater'in kurtardığı hakkında şanlı destanlar yazılacak!"
languages.original_text: "It could not have been otherwise, pure-hearted sister. Now the iron xenos will drink from the cup of the Allfather's wrath. Glorious sagas will be written about the captain who was freed by the Aett-Vater!"

traits.locale_text: "Başka türlü olamazdı temiz kalpli rahibe. Şimdi demir zenolar, Yücebaba'nın gazap kâsesinden içecek. Aett-Vater'in kurtardığı hakkında şanlı destanlar yazılacak!"

languages.text: «No pudo ser de otro modo, hermana de corazón puro. Ahora los xenos metálicos beberán del cáliz lleno de la cólera del Padre de todas las cosas. ¡Se compondrán sagas gloriosas sobre la liberación del capitán salvado por {mf|el|la} Aett-Vater!».
languages.original_text: "It could not have been otherwise, pure-hearted sister. Now the iron xenos will drink from the cup of the Allfather's wrath. Glorious sagas will be written about the captain who was freed by the Aett-Vater!"

traits.locale_text: «No pudo ser de otro modo, hermana de corazón puro. Ahora los xenos metálicos beberán del cáliz lleno de la cólera del Padre de todas las cosas. ¡Se compondrán sagas gloriosas sobre la liberación del capitán salvado por {mf|el|la} Aett-Vater!».

languages.text: “本该如此，赤诚的姐妹。如今，铁骸异形必将品尝全父之怒的苦果。被狼领解救的上尉，他的壮举定将载入辉煌的传奇！”
languages.original_text: "It could not have been otherwise, pure-hearted sister. Now the iron xenos will drink from the cup of the Allfather's wrath. Glorious sagas will be written about the captain who was freed by the Aett-Vater!"
